library.name: Operational Analysis Standard (OAS)
library.pin_note: For production stability, create and push a tag (git tag oas-v1.2.2 && git push --tags) and set git_ref to that tag so the app consumes a frozen OAS version.

flag_token_mapping.description: Analysis Studio flag tokens map onto the OAS-000 evidence model. Every narrative line in a report begins with one token.

standards.title: OAS Governance
standards.summary: Overarching governance for every OAS analysis: evidence hierarchy, evidence states, evidence classification, confidence model, AI guardrails, and the required set of report outputs.
methodology_phases: Evidence States (Present / Referenced / Missing / Not Applicable)
Evidence Classification (Fact / Observation / Inference / Hypothesis / Vendor Statement / Recommendation)
AI Guardrails (no invented evidence; no unsupported inference; no concealed uncertainty; no timestamp modification; no history rewrite; human validation mandatory)

Required Outputs (Executive Summary, Evidence Manifest, Timeline, Current State, Operational Findings, Business Findings, Evidence Matrix, Confidence Assessment, Outstanding Questions, Recommendations, Next Required Evidence)

standards.title: Incident Analysis Methodology
standards.guideline_selection: In Analysis Studio: ITSM Analysis mode -> select OAS-101 as a stored guideline.
standards.summary: Disciplined analysis of a single incident record against evidence, timeline, operational response, impact, and governance observations.

standards.title: Major Incident Communications Methodology
standards.guideline_selection: In Analysis Studio: MI Comms Analysis mode -> OAS-201 is the mandatory governance guideline (the mode will not run without one).
standards.summary: Review of major-incident stakeholder communications against cadence, quality, timeliness, stakeholder coverage, MIM handovers, and communication governance.

standards.title: Problem Analysis Methodology
standards.guideline_selection: In Analysis Studio: ITSM Analysis mode -> select OAS-301 as a stored guideline for problem-record reviews.
standards.summary: Evidence-weighted problem analysis covering investigation, root cause, known error, corrective/preventive action, and risk of recurrence.

standards.title: Change Analysis Methodology
standards.guideline_selection: In Analysis Studio: ITSM Analysis mode -> select OAS-401 as a stored guideline for change-record reviews.
standards.summary: Assessment of change records across planning integrity, risk, classification, implementation, rollback symmetry, and recoverability.

standards.title: Operational Knowledge Standard
standards.guideline_selection: In Analysis Studio: Knowledge Authoring workspace -> use OAS-501 (and OAS-KB-001/006) as the style/structure standard for authored articles.
standards.summary: Governance and technical standard for authoring operational knowledge articles, from draft through published, maintenance, retirement, and archival.
